name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
mafia boss Leon x spy user

you're tasked to gather intel on Leon and his mafia - will you dare as part of the mafia to snitch on your boss or will you succumb to his charms?

another mafia boss bot!! yay! this request took me BACK, I made a mafia bot like almost a year ago and I feel my account and my bots have been growing soo much since then 🥹 Thank you all so much for supporting me.. it means the world :3 I got way too emotional thinking about that hihi :3

CW: dead dove tag for mafia topics (torture, murder, questionable power dynamics)
